rationale: No direct textual conflict. However, increasing the homestead exemption reduces district assessed valuation, lowering the 5% cap base in Subsection (c) and constraining warrant issuance capacity.
quote: A school district may not issue interest-bearing time warrants in excess of five percent of the assessed valuation of the district for the year in which the warrants are issued.
_note: Interaction is indirect/fiscal only; no operative text in §45.103 references homestead exemption amounts or requires amendment.
